public_reputation: Known around Ashwake Port through day-to-day work as market clerk.
appearance: Valen Sealwater usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their market clerk status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Thinks in queues, seals, and exchange rhythm, with patience only for those who can stay clear and orderly. In Ashwake Port, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of market clerk in and around Ashwake Port, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashwake Port workable through the obligations of market clerk while managing the immediate pressure of harbor ash clogging, storm-whirlpool risk, port rivalry.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of market clerk credible while absorbing the strain created by harbor ash clogging, storm-whirlpool risk, port rivalry.

adventure_hooks.summary: Valen Sealwater can draw the party into a locality problem centered on market clerk duties in Ashwake Port.
Valen Sealwater becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with harbor ash clogging, storm-whirlpool risk, port rivalry around Ashwake Port.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Valen Sealwater is immediately readable as a market clerk tied to Ashwake Port.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashwake Port: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Valen Sealwater presents as someone shaped by the duties of a market clerk and the daily pressures of Ashwake Port.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a market clerk, and proof that strangers will not make Ashwake Port harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Valen Sealwater refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a market clerk too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can explain permits, trade flow, and where ordinary disruptions have started to show.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Valen Sealwater adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Valen Sealwater always knows more about Ashwake Port than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a market clerk in Ashwake Port.
